blended.narrative: Tremblant (Gray Rocks) is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.2 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,706 ft. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 5" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
